nodes.name: Chlorocichla
nodes.summary: Chlorocichla（Chlorocichla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如娇绿鸫鹎、Prigogine's greenbul、Falkenstein's greenbul等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: 娇绿鸫鹎
nodes.summary: 娇绿鸫鹎（Chlorocichla laetissima）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如娇绿鸫鹎。

nodes.name: 娇绿鸫鹎
nodes.summary: The joyful greenbul (Chlorocichla laetissima) or joyful bulbul, is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in east-central Africa. Its natural habitats are boreal forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. Taxonomy and systematics The joyful greenbul was originally described in the genus Andropadus and later re-classified within Chlorocichla. Subspecies Two subspecies of the joyful greenbul are recognized: C. l. laetissima - (Sharpe, 1899): Imatong Mountains, East African and northern Albertine rift montane forests C. l. schoutedeni - Prigogine, 1954: southern Albertine rift montane forests References External links Image at ADW
